column5: Description
column7: Reference series
column18: Notes

column5: Umsatz Insgesamt / in jeweiligen Preisen / Deutschland / 41+42 Hochbau und Tiefbau / Angaben für Betriebe mit mindestens 20 Beschäftigten / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Total Construction Spending: Total Construction in the United States
column18: Destatis publishes no "value put in place" series; firm turnover (Hochbau + Tiefbau, ≥20 employees) is the closest nominal proxy for construction-sector activity.

column5: Production, sales, work started and orders: Permits issued for dwellings
column7: New Privately-Owned Housing Units Authorized in Permit-Issuing Places: Total Units
column18: Equivalent; both are residential permit counts; shorter lag of statistisches Bundesamt is used.

column5: NA
column7: New One Family Houses Sold: United States
column18: No German monthly new-home-sales series exists; housing transactions are not published at comparable frequency/granularity.

column5: NA
column7: New Privately-Owned Housing Units Started: Total Units
column18: No German "starts" series; the residential pipeline is already captured by Baugenehmigungen (permits), making starts redundant and unavailable.

column5: Auftragseingang Insgesamt / in konstanten Preisen / Deutschland / Industrie / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Manufacturers' New Orders: Durable Goods
column18: Destatis does not split orders by durables; total industry Auftragseingang (real) preserves the leading-demand signal.

column5: Produktion im Produzierenden Gewerbe / Deutschland / Produzierendes Gewerbe ohne Bau (B - D) / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Industrial Production: Total Index
column18: Near-equivalent; German index covers Produzierendes Gewerbe excluding construction (B-D), a minor scope difference.

column5: Konjunkturumfrage bei Unternehmen und Verbrauchern (EU-Kommission) / Verarbeitendes Gewerbe / Kapazitätsauslastung / Deutschland / nur saisonbereinigt
column7: Capacity Utilization: Total Index
column18: No German hard cap-util series; the EU Commission survey (manufacturing) is the standard German measure, but it is survey-based, manufacturing-only, and SA without calendar adjustment.

column5: Umsatz Insgesamt / in jeweiligen Preisen / Deutschland / Industrie / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Manufacturers' Value of Shipments: Durable Goods
column18: Shipments map conceptually to turnover; durable split is unavailable, so total industry turnover (nominal) is used.

column5: NA
column7: Total Merchant Wholesalers, Except Manufacturers' Sales Branches and Offices Inventories
column18: No timely German monthly wholesale-inventory series comparable to US Census data.

column5: NA
column7: Total Business Inventories
column18: No equivalent German monthly business-inventory series.

column5: NA
column7: Manufacturers' Unfilled Orders: Total Manufacturing
column18: No comparable German backlog/unfilled-orders series at this frequency.

column5: NA
column7: Manufacturers' Total Inventories: Durable Goods
column18: No comparable German manufacturing-inventory series.

column5: Umsatz Insgesamt / in konstanten Preisen / Deutschland / 47 Einzelhandel (ohne Handel mit Kraftfahrzeugen) / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Advance Retail Sales: Retail Trade and Food Services
column18: Near-equivalent; German series excludes motor vehicles and food services and is real rather than nominal-advance, but tracks the same retail-demand role.

column5: Deutschland / Verwendung des Bruttoinlandsprodukts / Private Konsumausgaben / In verketteten Vorjahrespreisen (Kettenindex) / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Real Personal Consumption Expenditures
column18: Equivalent; national-accounts real private consumption (chain-linked), quarterly rather than monthly.

column5: Deutschland / Konto der privaten Haushalte / Verfügbares Einkommen inkl. Zunahme betrieblicher Versorgungsansprüche / In jeweiligen Preisen / nur saisonbereinigt
column7: Real Disposable Personal Income
column18: Same income concept, but German NA publishes it nominal only; the real adjustment present in the US series is lost.

column5: Erwerbstätige gemäß ESVG 2010 / Deutschland / Inlandskonzept / absolute Angabe / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: All Employees, Total Nonfarm
column18: Equivalent.

column5: Unemployment rate (%) - monthly data
column7: Unemployment Rate
column18: Equivalent.

column5: Sozialversicherungspflichtig Beschäftigte / Deutschland / Insgesamt / absolute Angabe / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Total Nonfarm Private Payroll Employment (DISCONTINUED)
column18: National-accounts real chain-linked imports replace the nominal BoP measure; same trade flow, real vs. nominal differs; 4 last obs are estimated.

column5: Productivity and unit labour costs: Unit labour costs (employment based), Seasonally adjusted, not calendar adjusted
column7: Nonfarm Business Sector: Unit Labor Costs for All Workers
column18: As above; real SNA exports substitute for nominal BoP exports.

column5: Gemeldete Arbeitsstellen insgesamt / Deutschland / Insgesamt / absolute Angabe / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Job Openings: Total Nonfarm
column18: Closest official German headcount; the domestic-concept measure is broader (includes self-employed and agriculture) than US establishment payrolls.

column5: Außenhandelspreise Einfuhr Insgesamt / Deutschland / kalender- und saisonbereinigt / Insgesamt
column7: Import Price Index (End Use): All Commodities
column18: Equivalent (ILO-harmonized).

column5: Außenhandelspreise Ausfuhr Insgesamt / Deutschland / kalender- und saisonbereinigt / Insgesamt
column7: Export Price Index (End Use): All Commodities
column18: Socially-insured employment (BA) is the closest German dependent-employment count; it excludes civil servants and self-employed but serves as the second labor-quantity series.

column5: Deutschland / Verwendung des Bruttoinlandsprodukts / Importe von Waren und Dienstleistungen / In verketteten Vorjahrespreisen (Kettenindex) / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Imports of Goods and Services: Balance of Payments Basis
column18: Equivalent; German is employment-based, SA without calendar adjustment.

column5: Deutschland / Verwendung des Bruttoinlandsprodukts / Exporte von Waren und Dienstleistungen / In verketteten Vorjahrespreisen (Kettenindex) / kalender- und saisonbereinigt
column7: Exports of Goods and Services, Balance of Payments Basis
column18: Registered BA vacancies are the only German vacancy series; they undercount total openings (only positions reported to the agency) but track the same direction.

column5: ifo Geschaeftsklimaindex
column7: ISM mfg.: PMI composite index
column18: The ifo Geschäftsklimaindex is the German analogue for the headline business-sentiment composite; it is broader than manufacturing-only.

column5: NA
column7: Current General Business Conditions; Diffusion Index for New York
column18: Regional US Fed surveys have no German regional analogue and are redundant with ifo.

column5: NA
column7: Current General Activity; Diffusion Index for Federal Reserve District 3: Philadelphia
column18: Same as Empire State; regional survey with no German counterpart, redundant with ifo.

column5: NA
column7: ISM nonmanufacturing: NMI composite index
column18: No separate German services-PMI used in this set; services sentiment is folded into the ifo climate.

column5: NA
column7: ISM mfg.: Prices index
column18: No German price-diffusion index used; price dynamics are captured by HICP and PPI hard data.

column5: ifo Beschäftigungsbarometer
column7: ISM mfg.: Employment index
column18: The ifo Beschäftigungsbarometer is the German survey-based employment-expectations diffusion indicator, analogous to the ISM employment subindex.

column5: Quarterly real GDP growth - Growth rate, period on period, Chain linked volume, Calendar and seasonally adjusted
column7: Real Gross Domestic Product
column18: Equivalent; the target/anchor variable (chain-linked, period-on-period); shorter lag of Bundesbank used.

column5: Harmonisierter Verbraucherpreisindex / Deutschland / kalender- und saisonbereinigt / Insgesamt / Angepasst an die Jahresmittel der kalenderbereinigten Reihe
column7: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items in U.S. City Average
column18: Near-equivalent; harmonized HICP replaces national CPI as the standard German/euro-area headline inflation gauge.

column5: NA
column7: Personal Consumption Expenditures: Chain-type Price Index
column18: No German PCE deflator; consumer-price dynamics already covered by HICP.

column5: Verbraucherpreisindex / Deutschland / kalender- und saisonbereinigt / Insgesamt ohne Energie und 01.1 Nahrungsmittel
column7: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items Less Food and Energy in U.S. City Average
column18: Near-equivalent; German national VPI ex energy and food substitutes for US core CPI.

column5: NA
column7: Personal Consumption Expenditures Excluding Food and Energy (Chain-Type Price Index)
column18: No German core PCE deflator; covered by CPI core.

column5: Erzeugerpreise gewerblicher Produkte im Inlandsabsatz / Deutschland / kalender- und saisonbereinigt / Insgesamt
column7: Producer Price Index by Commodity: Final Demand
column18: Near-equivalent; German PPI covers industrial domestic producer prices (goods only), narrower than US final-demand PPI which includes services.

column5: Deutschland / Gesamtwirtschaftliche Übersicht / Bruttonationaleinkommen / In jeweiligen Preisen / nur saisonbereinigt
column7: Real gross domestic income
column18: Germany publishes no quarterly real GDI; nominal Bruttonationaleinkommen is the income-side aggregate, but it differs (includes net foreign income, nominal vs. real).
